@行者恶狼","text_exts":[{"e":99,"s":94,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nwk/e5JT3hlEHMwQojalwc4rLw3yk3xXBAp8AJQqxCCL"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757290690,"group_id":"7529351055105084478","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxBVAZz1IpT+ogHtF22eLnk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"622761044090755","user_name":"用户名41172604"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"622761044090755","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529351055105084478","book_info":{"abstract":"叶少游重生在九叔的世界之中，靠着自己自身的先天异能，一步一步从弱到强，走向那最高，登临至尊天师之位，还是等到他成就天师位之后，才发现这一切才是刚刚开始，他为了成为更加强大的存在，他回到了过去，来到了唐朝西游量劫，他成了花果山第八圣，为了报复佛教他在西行路上建立了一座动画城，成为了西行路上最大的劫难，靠的功德，靠的气运，证道成圣做祖。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cab9c1948ac7358b986b8b122043abab","author":"行者恶狼","author_id":"","book_id":"7529351055105084478","book_name":"九叔的得意弟子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b09080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2764人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100 为了貂蝉跟孙悟空大战几百回合，但是薛宝钗确
实太强了，要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断
头台，加m4六倍镜扫射必死除业之外，我比较欣
这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描述吕布为了貂蝉跟孙
悟空大战几百回合。但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是
有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫
射必死，除此之外，我比较欣赏诸葛亮对花果山108个
猴子说的一句话“小伙子一生傲骨别在你亮哥面前摆
谱”表现出诸葛亮被猴子三棒敲死的愤慨，总而言之这
本书很值得观看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760694309,"group_id":"7529351055105084478","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzslf4aSSbH1FGLA7XYdq9vPLhhqVvdK71s+qDf8cZ/T","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"1759651156736557","user_name":"青云谷的校条祭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1759651156736557","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529351055105084478","book_info":{"abstract":"叶少游重生在九叔的世界之中，靠着自己自身的先天异能，一步一步从弱到强，走向那最高，登临至尊天师之位，还是等到他成就天师位之后，才发现这一切才是刚刚开始，他为了成为更加强大的存在，他回到了过去，来到了唐朝西游量劫，他成了花果山第八圣，为了报复佛教他在西行路上建立了一座动画城，成为了西行路上最大的劫难，靠的功德，靠的气运，证道成圣做祖。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cab9c1948ac7358b986b8b122043abab","author":"行者恶狼","author_id":"","book_id":"7529351055105084478","book_name":"九叔的得意弟子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b09080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2764人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema
